ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_level" TEXT /* Level of the location (e.g., city, county, state) */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the location data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the ethnicity */,
  "is_minority" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the ethnicity is considered a minority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ethnicity */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "covid_test" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 tests */,
  "covid_count" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 cases */,
  "covid_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 deaths */,
  "covid_test_pct" REAL /* Percentage of COVID-19 tests */,
  "covid_count_pct" REAL /* Percentage of COVID-19 cases */,
  "covid_deaths_pct" REAL /* Percentage of COVID-19 deaths */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  "hospitalization_count" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations due to COVID-19 */,
  "icu_count" INTEGER /* Number of ICU admissions due to COVID-19 */,
  "recovery_count" INTEGER /* Number of recoveries from COVID-19 */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ethnicity */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line chart) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the visualization is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the external data source */,
  "last_imported" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last imported from this source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the data source is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the data import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who imported the data */,
  "import_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the data import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_imported_by FOREIGN KEY ("imported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is public */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_data" TEXT /* Data for the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dashboard was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the dashboard is public */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the dashboard is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dashboard */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dashboard */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_access_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)
